name: Peanut Butter Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease two large baking sheets and place them on wire racks.
2. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine the sugar, peanut butter, corn syrup, and water.
3. Stir constantly over medium heat until the mixture reaches 300 degrees F (150 C) on a candy thermometer.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the baking powder.
5. Quickly pour the mixture onto the prepared cookie sheets.
6. Allow to cool for 3 to 5 minutes until it is cool enough to handle.
7. Using your hands, grasp the edges of the brittle by pulling them away slightly, stretching as thin as possible.
8. Cool completely before breaking into irregular pieces.
9. Store in a tightly covered container.
Makes: 1 1/4 pounds
